description: UK-based digital health company providing telemedicine and occupational health services to employers. Operates Push Doctor brand for consumer telemedicine and offers corporate health programs including GP access, mental health support, and health assessments.
business_model: B2B - Corporate health contracts; B2C via Push Doctor brand
target_market: UK employers and consumers seeking digital healthcare access
competitive_advantage: Established GP network, digital-first approach, corporate and consumer presence

varden_fit.rationale: Direct competitor in UK occupational health market - established player
